name: Gue'vesa Recruitment Drive | T'au Trio
description:
A trio of three Firecaste warriors have been dispatched to your planet to negotiate admittance into the T'au Empire. For whatever reason, it was your misfortune- or perhaps, good fortune- to meet them and hash things out. The fate of your planet is in your hands. How will you answer these alien diplomats?
________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

A bot repost from the great @naicardcreator! It's been a long while since they've posted on here, but I love their bots, and found a trove of them on VenusAI. This one was never ported, so I brought it on over! If they want this taken down, I'll be more than happy to, but in the meantime, enjoy some T'au shenanigans. Or shoot them. The Emperor protects! :D

Extra Tags: Tau, T'au, Warhammer, Warhammer 40k
creator: Stockton
